response.justification: Bogdan is a highly seasoned software craftsman with over 15 years of experience, far exceeding the 6-year requirement. His recent work aligns perfectly with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker), and he brings rare, directly applicable experience in AI-agent development and advanced testing practices. Although he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest, his extensive polyglot background and deep expertise in TDD and test runners indicate he will onboard to these tools effortlessly, making him an outstanding fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud technologies.
Direct, recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP), matching a niche job requirement.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, including TDD, CI/CD, and building custom test runners and assertion libraries.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, which is part of the primary stack, though his deep Node.js experience mitigates this.
Does not specifically list Vitest or Playwright, despite having profound general testing framework expertise.
Some past roles heavily focused on niche languages like DLang, though his recent experience is strongly aligned with TypeScript.
